fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Budget Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the cost budget that the entry belongs to.

fields.name: Cost Type No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subtype of the cost center. This is an information field and is not used for any other purposes. Choose the field to select the cost subtype.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the cost budget entry.

fields.name: Cost Center Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost center code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Cost Object Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost object code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the cost budget entries.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the cost budget entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related document.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry created by the system for the cost budget entry.

fields.name: Allocated
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the cost entry has been allocated.

fields.name: Allocated with Journal No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies which cost journal was used to allocate the cost budget.

fields.name: Last Modified By User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who made the last change to the cost budget.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date of when the cost budget entry was modified.

fields.name: Allocation Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description that explains the allocation level and shares.

fields.name: Allocation ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the allocation key that the cost budget entry comes from.
